summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN management system - Iteration 5. Validated that ALL CRUD operations work for worker role (dolgozo) after permission changes. All 24 backend tests passed using test_dolgozo_session token. Frontend verification confirmed: Advanced Analytics moved from Dashboard to Statistics page, and all CRUD buttons (Új szolgáltatás, Új termék, Új dolgozó, Új műszak, edit/delete icons) are visible for worker role users.
passed_tests: API health check (/api/) - X-CLEAN API v1.0.0
Worker session (test_dolgozo_session) authentication - role: dolgozo
GET /api/services - worker role access
POST /api/services - worker role can CREATE service (was admin-only)
PUT /api/services/{id} - worker role can UPDATE service (was admin-only)
DELETE /api/services/{id} - worker role can DELETE service (was admin-only)
GET /api/workers - worker role access
POST /api/workers - worker role can CREATE worker (was admin-only)
PUT /api/workers/{id} - worker role can UPDATE worker (was admin-only)
DELETE /api/workers/{id} - worker role can DELETE worker (was admin-only)
GET /api/inventory - worker role access
POST /api/inventory - worker role can CREATE inventory item (was admin-only)
PUT /api/inventory/{id} - worker role can UPDATE inventory item
DELETE /api/inventory/{id} - worker role can DELETE inventory item (was admin-only)
GET /api/shifts - worker role access
POST /api/shifts - worker role can CREATE shift (was admin-only)
DELETE /api/shifts/{id} - worker role can DELETE shift (was admin-only)
GET /api/day-records/today - worker role access
POST /api/day-records/open - worker role can open day
POST /api/day-records/close - worker role can close day
GET /api/stats/advanced - returns analytics data with worker role
GET /api/stats/dashboard - returns dashboard stats with worker role
Frontend Dashboard - NO advanced analytics cards (correctly removed)

Frontend Statistics page - ALL advanced analytics cards visible (avg-revenue-card, returning-customers-card, month-cars-change-card, month-revenue-change-card, employee-revenue-card, location-revenue-card, top-customers-card)
Frontend Services page - 'Új szolgáltatás' button visible for worker
Frontend Services page - Edit and Delete icons on each service card
Frontend Inventory page - 'Új termék' button visible for worker
Frontend Inventory page - Edit and Delete icons in table rows
Frontend Workers page Dolgozók tab - 'Új dolgozó' button visible
Frontend Workers page Dolgozók tab - Edit and Delete buttons for each worker
Frontend Workers page Műszakbeosztás tab - 'Új műszak' button visible
Frontend DayManagement - Location selector working
Frontend DayManagement - Shows day status (Nap lezárva for Budapest)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix was cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRUD operations now work for both admin and worker roles after backend changes from require_admin to get_current_user. Advanced analytics successfully moved from Dashboard to Statistics page. Day records for Budapest are closed for today (2026-03-04). The app has 41 services, 7 workers, and 13 inventory items. Worker role (test_dolgozo_session with user dolgozo@xclean.hu) can now perform all CRUD operations previously restricted to admin only.
